"'''The Path of Evil'''" is an article by [[Abel G. Peña]] appearing in ''[[Vader: The Ultimate Guide]]''. It chronicles the history of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] beginning with [[Darth Ruin/Legends|Darth Ruin]].
